scripts.setup:mac: bun install && cd apps/api && uv venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:windows: bun install && cd apps/api && uv venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:api: cd apps/api && uv venv .venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
